subcodes.first_line: Address not any soul among the steadfast in such manner as would cause sorrow or distress; rather, lower thy wing of humility unto the believers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: با نفسی از ثابتین نوعی مفرمایید که محزون و مگدر شود فاخفض جناحک للمومنین و
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
